name: Breadmaker Hints#2 Rev
recipeIngredient: Sourdough starter (white, potato/sweet bread, whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use butter, margarine, diet margarine, olive oil, or other fats in your recipes.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of buttermilk powder to the flour and mix well.
3. Some people prefer to add buttermilk powder right after the yeast.
4. Substitute eggbeaters or dry egg substitutes for eggs.
5. Use sourdough starter (white, potato/sweet bread, whole wheat) in your recipes.
6. Decrease water or milk amounts when adding a starter.
7. For whole wheat or dark breads, use more flour than the recipe calls for.
8. When adding nuts or raisins, mix them with about 2 teaspoons of flour before adding to the dough.
9. Add nuts or raisins towards the end of the second cycle, just before beeping.
10. Raisins add moisture; you may need a bit more flour after adding them.
11. Slice bread using an electric knife.
12. Cut round bread in half vertically first, then into slices.
13. Store sliced bread in baggies until it is completely cooled.
14. Keep the first day's portion on the counter; store leftovers in the refrigerator or freezer.
